globalContext: This project appears to be a software analysis tool, likely for code quality and complexity assessment. It includes various components such as scanners (e.g., ComplexityScanner, DuplicateScanner), publishers (e.g., StatusBarManager, DiagnosticsPublisher), and graph-related classes (e.g., FlowTracer, ImpactAnalyzer) that work together to analyze code. The project also contains rule sets for different programming languages and a configuration manager to handle settings. The `AnalysisOrchestrator` seems to be the central component that coordinates these various parts to perform comprehensive code analysis.

symbols.name: ResultStore
symbols.summary: A class implementing IResultStore that stores and manages file analysis results in an in-memory map.

methods.name: save
methods.summary: Saves or overwrites a FileAnalysisResult for a given file URI.

methods.name: get
methods.summary: Retrieves the last FileAnalysisResult for a specified file URI, returning undefined if no result exists.

methods.name: getAll
methods.summary: Returns all stored FileAnalysisResults as an array, used by the dashboard and status bar.

methods.name: remove
methods.summary: Deletes a FileAnalysisResult from the store when a file is closed to prevent stale data.

methods.name: clear
methods.summary: Removes all FileAnalysisResults from the store, effectively clearing the cache.

symbols.name: UnderstandingGenerator
symbols.summary: A class that generates a structured understanding of a codebase by analyzing its graph, summarizing symbols with AI, and building a document for an LLM.

methods.name: constructor
methods.summary: Initializes the UnderstandingGenerator with methods to get the code graph, summarize files, and scan with AI.

methods.name: generate
methods.summary: Main method that orchestrates the generation process, including grouping nodes by file, probing AI availability, summarizing symbols, and building the final document.

methods.name: probeAi
methods.summary: Checks if the AI provider is ready for use, ensuring it can respond to requests.

methods.name: groupByFile
methods.summary: Groups code graph nodes by their respective files, preparing them for batch processing by the AI.

methods.name: summarizeFileSymbols
methods.summary: Requests summaries from the AI for symbols in a file and returns these summaries as a map.

methods.name: retryFallbacks
methods.summary: Retries summarizing symbols that failed to be summarized in the initial pass, focusing on those with structural fallbacks.

methods.name: buildFileEntry
methods.summary: Constructs a detailed entry for a file, including its summary and symbol entries, by analyzing relationships and using file summaries.

methods.name: toSymbolEntry
methods.summary: Converts a code graph node into a SymbolEntry, capturing its name, kind, summary, and relationships.

methods.name: relationships
methods.summary: Determines the calling and called relationships between symbols, filtering out built-in method calls.

methods.name: fallbackSummary
methods.summary: Provides a fallback summary for symbols that could not be summarized by the AI, using structural information.

methods.name: isFallback
methods.summary: Checks if a symbol entry is a fallback, indicating it was not successfully summarized by the AI.

methods.name: buildGlobalContext
methods.summary: Generates a project-wide paragraph summarizing the architecture and relationships within the codebase.

methods.summary: Scans a document, returning both issues and raw blocks for further processing.

methods.summary: Removes duplicate issues across different rule sets, prioritizing more specific ones.

methods.summary: Filters out AI issues that are already covered by static rules, considering line proximity and keyword overlap.

methods.name: sameRootConcept
methods.summary: Determines if two messages describe the same security or quality concept using predefined groups of synonyms.

methods.name: keyWords
methods.summary: Extracts meaningful keywords from a message to help in filtering and comparison.

methods.name: deduplicate
methods.summary: Removes duplicate issues based on their content, considering line proximity and keyword overlap.

methods.name: dispose
methods.summary: Cleans up resources used by the orchestrator.
